# Real-service audio round-trip smoke (#8876)

First real-service validation of the @elizaos/plugin-elevenlabs TTS+STT path
(all existing plugin tests mock the SDK). text -> real TTS -> MP3 -> sha256
content-addressed handle -> real STT -> transcript recovers the input phrase.

## With a live ELEVENLABS key (`bun run --cwd packages/scenario-runner test:real-service:audio`)
```
provider: elevenlabs (REAL api)
tts: 43511 bytes, model=eleven_turbo_v2_5, voice=CwhRBWXzGAHq8TQ4Fs17 → PASS (valid MP3)
media-handle: /api/media/488d35a7be33e043ed25c98b95f3a3b33b87e172473e5eedbeea1d17d8ddb3be.mp3 → PASS
stt: "Eliza generated this audio attachment." (lang=eng, recall=100%) → PASS
exit: 0
```

## CI-safe skip path (no key) — exit 0, never red-fails a keyless build
```
SKIP real-service-audio-roundtrip: no ELEVENLABS_API_KEY / ELEVENLABS_XI_API_KEY in env
exit: 0
```

## CI-safe skip path (invalid key) — auth error -> skip, exit 0
```
SKIP real-service-audio-roundtrip: auth failed listing voices (HTTP 401) — set a valid ElevenLabs key to run
exit: 0
```
